# Scorer unit registry

Derived from the `@unit-begin` frontmatter in `harness/**`. Regenerate with `node scripts/generate-scorer-registry.js`.

Every dual-export unit attaches to `self.SensoryNavScore` at load (a uniform load-time effect, not per-call).

| unit | causality | state | mutates | contract | deps | realtime | tested-by |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `harness/audio/load-pass.js` | acausal | none | io:fs | loadPass(wavPath,sidecarPath) -> {windows,sampleRate,warnings} · windowsFromSamples(samples,sampleRate,audioFirstFrameMs) -> windows[] | audio/wav-decoder, audio/audio-windows | batch-only | tests/load-pass.test.js |
| `harness/score/baseline.js` | acausal | none | none | fitBaseline(samples,params) -> baseline{low,mid,high,subbass:{points,global,meta}} · floorAt(baseline,band,speed) -> number · globalFloorAt(baseline,band) -> number · baselineMeta(baseline) -> meta | score/metrics | needs-streaming-variant | tests/score-baseline.test.js |
| `harness/score/felt.js` | acausal | none | none | loadFelt(obj) -> {spans,events} · mapFeltToWindows(felt,windows) -> perWindow[{felt_present,felt_magnitude}] | — | batch-only | tests/score-felt.test.js |
| `harness/score/report.js` | acausal | none | none | scoredWindowsJson(scored) -> string · sessionSummaryJson(summary) -> string · scoredWindowsCsv(scored) -> string · inspectionHtml(scored,summary) -> string | — | batch-only | tests/score-report.test.js |
| `harness/score/roughness.js` | acausal | none | none | scoreWindowRoughness(sp1win,speed,baseline,params) -> {roughness_raw,roughness,detected,magnitude} | score/baseline | batch-only | tests/score-roughness.test.js |
| `harness/score/run-scorer.js` | acausal | none | io:fs | scorePasses(passes,params) -> {baseline,baseline_meta,per_pass_scored,batch} · runScorer(opts{passFiles,outDir,params}) -> summary | audio/load-pass, motion/motion-track, score/baseline, score/reliability, score/score-pass, score/validate, score/report | batch-only | tests/score-run.test.js |
| `harness/score/score-pass.js` | acausal | none | none | scorePass(sp1windows,sp2track,baseline,felt,params) -> scored[] | score/roughness, score/reliability, score/felt | batch-only | tests/score-pass.test.js |
| `harness/score/validate.js` | acausal | none | none | validatePass(scored,params) -> summary{n_total,n_excluded,presence,magnitude} · validateBatch(perPassScored,params) -> {per_pass[],aggregate} | score/metrics | batch-only | tests/score-validate.test.js |
| `harness/audio/audio-windows.js` | causal | none | none | framesToWindows(samples,sampleRate,audioFirstFrameMs) -> windows[] · stft(samples,sampleRate) -> frames[{centerSample,energies}] · windowIndexFor(frameCenterSample,samplesPerWindow) -> number | audio/fft | reuse-as-is | tests/audio-windows.test.js |
| `harness/score/spectral-chaos.js` | causal | none | none | computeSpectralChaos(samples,fs,opts) -> {params,subbass[],low[],mid[],high[]} · tonality(power,loBin,hiBin,k) -> number[0,1] · powerSpectrum(samples,start,N) -> Float64Array | — | reuse-as-is | tests/score-spectral-chaos.test.js |
| `harness/score/speech-detect.js` | causal | none | none | detectSpeech(frames,sr) -> {speechCount,isTalking(i)->bool,speechRanges} | score/roughness-db | reuse-as-is | tests/speech-detect.test.js |
| `harness/motion/kalman-smoother.js` | compose | none | none | smooth(points,sigmaA) -> smoothed[{t,s,P}] · evaluateAt(smoothed,t,sigmaA) -> {s,P} · forwardFilter(points,sigmaA) -> filtered[{sFilt,PFilt,sPred,PPred}] · rtsBackward(points,filtered) -> smoothed[{t,s,P}] · kalmanStep(state,fix,sigmaA) -> {state,out} — pure per-fix predict+update core · (causal/carried core of forwardFilter; mutates:none, fresh state each call) | motion/linalg | needs-streaming-variant | tests/kalman-smoother.test.js, tests/kalman-step.test.js |
| `harness/motion/motion-track.js` | compose | none | none | buildMotionTrack(gpsSamples,windows,params) -> track[{window_id,lat,lon,speed_mps,heading_deg,speed_confidence,speed_source,flags}] · classifyWindow(t,startedAtMs,speed,vEast,vNorth,velTraceVar,fixes,params) -> {confidence,source,flags,heading} · confidenceFromCov(velTraceVar,params) -> number | motion/geo-project, motion/kalman-smoother | batch-only | tests/motion-track.test.js, tests/motion-track-latlon.test.js |
| `harness/score/research-scorer.js` | compose | none | none | scoreResearch(front,opts) -> {scored[],hires,baseline_meta} | score/baseline, score/reliability, score/roughness-db, score/score-frontend (front is its output) | needs-streaming-variant | tests/research-scorer.test.js |
| `harness/score/score-frontend.js` | compose | none | none | buildFrontEnd(input{wavBytes\|samples+sampleRate,audioFirstFrameMs,gpsSamples}) -> {samples,sr,sp1,frames,sp2,sp2By} · buildWindows(wavBytes,audioFirstFrameMs) -> {samples,sr,sp1,frames} · (causal core: decode -> framesToWindows -> stft; mutates:none) | audio/wav-decoder, audio/audio-windows, motion/motion-track | needs-streaming-variant | tests/score-frontend.test.js, tests/score-frontend-core.test.js |

| `harness/tags/schema.js` | compose | none | io:fs | validateTag(rec) -> {ok,errors} · loadRegistry(dirOrObj) -> registry | — | batch-only | tests/tags-schema.test.js |
